title: Business Phone Buying Guide
description: A practical checklist for comparing VoIP and business phone providers.

sections.title: Start With Users and Call Flow
sections.content: List active users, shared numbers, departments, and queues before comparing plan tiers.

sections.title: Compare the Real Monthly Cost
sections.content: Ask about taxes, emergency service fees, devices, implementation, support, and contract terms.

faqs.question: What should I ask during a demo?
faqs.answer: Ask about number porting, support response times, uptime history, integrations, taxes, and cancellation terms.
